title: View time tracked/jobs done for each client

posts.author: Girlywoo (Linsey Houston)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I have a CRM board of all our clients and a job board of our work. For each job we track time in subitems that become a total time in the main item.

I have connected the boards so that for each job, I can assign the client.

I would like to find a way to view total time tracked for the month per client and as a bonus, a list of jobs done in the month. Any one have any clues?

Thanks so much for your time to read,

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Girlywoo

Not sure if that can be achieved without an add-on. With the Analytics & Reports add-on you can easily create reports like that and schedule them to be emailed to all stakeholders.

You can find more information about Screenful on the marketplace: https://monday.com/marketplace/19

BR,
Sami
